page: Microsoft Azure D2s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with an x86_64 architecture, providing 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 1 physical core with 2 threads. The CPU operates at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz and includes a 260 MB L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, though it is Premium Storage capable for remote disk attachments.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core performance, highlighted by a Geekbench single-core score of 2116.0 and single-threaded gzip compression throughput of 31.33 GB/sec. However, multi-core and memory subsystem performance are relatively weak. The stress-ng multi-core CPU test scored 1991.89, and the Geekbench multi-core score reached 2631.0. Uncached large-block memory bandwidth is limited, with read speeds at 20.8 GB/sec and write speeds at 14.3 GB/sec. Database and web serving operations also show lower throughput, with Redis SET operations at 2.95 million operations per second and static web serving at 4.4 GB/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D2s_v6 offers a low-cost entry point into dedicated Intel Xeon compute resources without the overhead of local storage. It is best suited for lightweight, single-threaded workloads, basic web serving, development environments, and small-scale background tasks that benefit from high clock speeds but do not require high memory bandwidth or intensive multi-core parallel processing.
description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dsv6 family, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 2 dedicated vCPUs (1 physical core, 2 threads) and 8.0 GB of RAM, with no local storage or integrated GPUs. The server exhibits strong single-core capabilities, achieving high marks in single-threaded gzip compression and Geekbench single-core tests. Conversely, multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are relatively weak, as evidenced by lower scores in stress-ng multi-core and uncached large-block memory transfers. Lacking local storage, this Premium Storage capable instance represents a cost-efficient option for lightweight workloads. It is best suited for single-threaded applications, development environments, and basic web serving tasks that do not demand intensive multi-core scaling or high memory throughput.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v6 is a general-purpose VM featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, offering strong single-core performance for lightweight workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v6 is a general-purpose VM with 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, optimized for single-threaded and lightweight workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual-vCPU virtual machine delivering strong single-core performance and balanced memory for entry-level workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs
Equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory and a 260 MB L3 cache
Strong single-threaded performance in compression and Geekbench tests
No bundled local storage or GPU, supporting Premium Storage remote disks
Best suited for lightweight web serving, development, and single-core tasks
